name: agios-andreas-3d
description: Ι.Ν. Ἁγίου Ἀνδρέου Πατρῶν · educational 3D web app (Astro + three.js + WebXR + Capacitor APK)

scripts.android:add: npm run build && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run build && npx cap open android
scripts.android:build:debug: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
